ast.source: Disable if you dont want Calendar View to be opened during the initial vault launch
ast.target: 如果您不希望在初始库启动时打开日历视图，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Select the calendar type to be displayed. While the week in the US type starts from Sunday,
                in the ISO 8601 type, the week starts from Monday
ast.target: \n                选择要显示的日历类型。美国类型的周从周日开始，\n                而 ISO 8601 类型的周从周一开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable if you want to have week numbers within the calendar view
ast.target: 如果您希望在日历视图中显示周数，请启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the behaviour you want to have when you click on file name in the calendar view
ast.target: 选择在日历视图中点击文件名时您希望的行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the sorting behaviour in the file list
ast.target: 选择文件列表中的排序行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Select the date source to be used in each folder. It can be either YAML Key or File Name.
                Depending on what you provide within the date format, it will try to parse the date source.
ast.target: 选择每个文件夹中要使用的日期源。它可以是 YAML 键或文件名。\n                根据您在日期格式中提供的内容，它将尝试解析日期源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the YAML Key that should be used for displaying in the calendar
ast.target: 设置用于在日历中显示的 YAML 键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make sure that you reload the plugin if you changed YAML key or Date Format
ast.target: 如果您更改了 YAML 键或日期格式，请确保重新加载插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Define the default behaviour for new note button if it should create under the active date or current date (today).
                This setting will drive the date for the YAML Key value and File Name.
ast.target:
定义新建笔记按钮的默认行为，即它应在活动日期还是当前日期（今天）下创建。
                此设置将驱动 YAML 键值和文件名的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the default folder, under which the new files should be saved when use plugin + icon
ast.target: 选择使用插件 + 图标时新文件应保存在哪个默认文件夹下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default file name prefix date format that will be used when you create a note using + icon. Leave blank if you dont want any
ast.target: 设置使用 + 图标创建笔记时将使用的默认文件名前缀日期格式。如果您不想要任何前缀，请留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this setting to change the direction of Cancel and New Note buttons within the New Note Creation Modal
ast.target: 启用此设置以更改新建笔记创建模态框中“取消”和“新建笔记”按钮的方向。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable this if you want whole calendar view to be scrollable and not only the file list
ast.target: 如果您希望整个日历视图可滚动，而不仅仅是文件列表，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the default behaviour for file names when they dont fit to the view
ast.target: 更改文件名在视图中无法完全显示时的默认行为。
